title: Calculus Notes
text:
The derivative of x squared is two x.

The derivative of x cubed is three x squared.

Polynomial derivative rules are used in basic calculus.

title: Optimization Notes
text:
Gradient descent updates parameters in the opposite direction of the gradient.

A learning rate controls the update size.

title: Biology Notes
text:
Photosynthesis turns light energy into chemical energy.

Chlorophyll absorbs light and supports this process in plants.

title: Machine Learning Notes
text: Logistic regression uses a sigmoid function to map a real number to a probability between zero and one.
